tools.name: aToZ.getProgrammesAtoZSearch
tools.description: Get the Programmes whose title begins with the given initial character.

tools.name: categories.getCategories
tools.description: Get the list of all the categories in TV & iPlayer.

tools.name: channels.getChannels
tools.description: Get the list of all the channels TV & iPlayer.

tools.name: channels.getHighlightsByChannel
tools.description: Get the editorial highlights of a given channel in TV & iPlayer.

tools.name: episodes.getEpisodesByCategory
tools.description: Get the list of all the episodes for a given category in TV & iPlayer.

tools.name: episodes.getEpisodesByGroup
tools.description: Get episodes by group, brand or series

tools.name: episodes.getEpisodesByParentPid
tools.description: Get the child episodes belonging to a given programme identifier.

tools.name: episodes.getProgrammeByPid
tools.description: Get the episode for a given episode identifier.

tools.name: metadata.getStatus
tools.description: Get the current iPlayer business layer status. This tells the caller the status of the iPlayer data, but not necessarily the overall status of the website. In the future it might include the status of the dependent data services within the BBC.

tools.name: programmesTleOs.getHighlightsByCategory
tools.description: Get the editorial highlights of a given category in TV & iPlayer.

tools.name: programmesTleOs.getProgrammesByCategory
tools.description: Get the list of all the Programmes (TLEOs) for a given category in TV & iPlayer.

tools.name: programmesTleOs.getProgrammesByParentPid
tools.description: Get the programme for a given programme identifier.

tools.name: regions.getRegions
tools.description: Get the list of all the regions TV & iPlayer.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
